reports.query: Evaluate Metformin for NAFLD indication expansion
reports.executive_summary: Metformin shows moderate promise for NAFLD treatment based on anti-inflammatory mechanisms. However, pioglitazone remains the preferred option per current AASLD guidelines.

key_findings.finding: 3 Phase 2 trials show 20-30% reduction in liver fat content
Resmetirom (Madrigal) recently approved for NASH, changing competitive dynamics
505(b)(2) pathway feasible with existing safety data

reports.recommendation: PROCEED WITH CAUTION - Consider differentiated formulation or combination strategy

reports.query: Assess Metformin for anti-aging longevity indication
reports.executive_summary: TAME trial data pending. Strong mechanistic rationale via AMPK activation and cellular senescence reduction. Regulatory pathway unclear for 'aging' as an indication.

key_findings.finding: Observational data shows 15-30% reduction in all-cause mortality in diabetic patients on metformin
FDA has not approved 'aging' as a disease indication - surrogate endpoints needed
Anti-aging market projected at $93B by 2030, but reimbursement uncertain

reports.recommendation: MONITOR - Wait for TAME trial results before committing resources
